mapper.update: UPDATE place SET is_active = #{isActive} WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
mapper.select: SELECT af_id FROM accommodation WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO accommodation_other_facility (other_fac_id, af_id, facility_name) VALUES (other_fac_seq.NEXTVAL, #{afId}, #{otherFacility})
